candidate_a.title: BeatRoute Runner
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Difficulty maintaining consistent pacing during endurance training
candidate_a.core_concept: Rhythm-action game mechanics applied to physical running cadence.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A rhythm-based running app where the user selects a pre-mixed track and the game provides haptic or audio cues to match their stride to the beat.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A treadmill-focused app that plays one pre-selected track and uses the accelerometer to track if the user's steps align with the beat. | Integrate accelerometer data stream; Implement beat-detection logic for one track; Build simple UI for feedback on stride alignment

candidate_b.title: BeatRoute Runner
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Difficulty maintaining consistent pacing during endurance training
candidate_b.core_concept: Rhythm-action game where the user's running speed acts as the beat matcher for an procedurally generated audio experience.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Use the device accelerometer to sync game events to cadence, where reaching cadence milestones unlocks faster melodic overlays in a song soundtrack.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A treadmill-focused build enabling one pre-selected electronic music track where speed matches track elements.

candidate_a.title: User-Generated Video Repository
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Inability to find or license high-quality, authentic smartphone unboxing footage
candidate_a.core_concept: A direct procurement bridge for authentic consumer video assets.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A curated community connecting D2C brands with creators for authentic unboxing and product usage videos.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A closed Slack group vetting 20 creators and 20 brands. | Recruit 20 creators.; Recruit 20 brands.; Facilitate connections in Slack.; Monitor quality of output.

candidate_b.title: User-Generated Video Repository
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Inability to find or license high-quality, authentic smartphone unboxing footage
candidate_b.core_concept: Peer-to-peer exchange for authentic consumer social media video assets
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Direct procurement bridge linking video creators with brand social managers
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Closed Slack group vetting 20 creators supplying 20 small brands

candidate_a.title: Legal Workflow Traffic Controller
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Uncontrolled document version chaos across external law firms.
candidate_a.core_concept: Automated synchronization of shared folder structures managed by intelligent filing agents.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: The agent moves incoming files into designated folders based on metadata patterns and alerts if structural changes don't adhere to house style.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Automated folder sorting agent interfacing exclusively with shared enterprise cloud document repositories.

candidate_b.title: Legal Workflow Traffic Controller
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Uncontrolled document version chaos across external law firms.
candidate_b.core_concept: Automated enforcement of folder structures and naming conventions for shared documents.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A script that monitors a local or cloud-synced folder and alerts users when files violate naming or structural conventions.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A folder-watcher service that scans a specific directory and generates a report of non-compliant files. | Define naming/structure rules; Implement file system watcher; Build compliance checker; Create alert/reporting mechanism

candidate_a.title: Technical Debt Resolution Tasking
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Difficulty hiring fractional experts to debug one-off legacy code patches
candidate_a.core_concept: Micro-scope project matchmaking tailored strictly for specific framework codebases
candidate_a.proposed_approach: AI-moderated skill verification for legacy system languages to find precise specialist coders
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Manual pilot job-matching board restricted to three niche PHP and React bug-fixes

candidate_b.title: Technical Debt Resolution Tasking
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Difficulty hiring fractional experts to debug one-off legacy code patches
candidate_b.core_concept: Micro-scope project matchmaking for specific legacy codebases.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A manual matchmaking service connecting solo founders with developers specialized in specific legacy frameworks for small bug fixes.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A manual job board/matching service for 3 specific niche bug-fix projects. | Identify 3 niche legacy frameworks.; Find 3 developers per framework.; Match with 3 founders.; Monitor resolution success.

candidate_a.title: Personal Flavor Genome Modeler
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Inability to predict which meals currently maximize palatability vs nausea
candidate_a.core_concept: Correlative nutrient adjustment system based on specific neuro-sensory feedback loops
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Delivering custom savory snacks modeled off tracked daily biometric and linguistic sentiment ratings of food quality
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Three day delivery set monitored by participant phone journals analyzing flavor preference patterns in one clinic community

candidate_b.title: Personal Flavor Genome Modeler
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Inability to predict which meals currently maximize palatability vs nausea
candidate_b.core_concept: Customized food delivery based on individual sensory feedback.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A personalized snack subscription service based on user-reported flavor preferences and feedback.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Deliver 3 snack boxes to 5 users, adjusting subsequent boxes based on their written feedback. | Create a flavor preference survey; Source 5 snack varieties; Deliver and collect feedback; Iterate on box contents
